summary: Fixed leanls localtime watchdog error by changing time.timeZone from lib.mkDefault to lib.mkForce in configuration.nix. This ensures /etc/localtime symlink always exists at boot, even when automatic-timezoned sets timeZone to null. User must run nixos-rebuild switch to apply.

artifacts.summary: Changed timezone priority to lib.mkForce with explanatory comments
Implementation summary documenting the fix and verification steps

completion_data.completion_summary: Fixed leanls watchdog error by using lib.mkForce for time.timeZone in configuration.nix, ensuring /etc/localtime always exists at boot regardless of automatic-timezoned's null override.

metadata.notes: Phase 1 completed (config change + flake check). Phases 2-3 require user action: sudo nixos-rebuild switch and Lean LSP verification.

next_steps: Run 'sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .' to apply configuration, then verify /etc/localtime exists and leanls works
